message:
style: add Magnetic to footer social icons, update tool/star counts

- Wrap footer social links with Magnetic component (desktop + mobile)
- Update year fallback from "..." to 2026 for better SSR display
- Update site description: 10 core tools → 14, 10K+ stars → 16K+
- Update hero intro: 10 core tools → 14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
